name: Black Bean Nacho Gratin
recipeIngredient: 19 oz Can black beans, drained & rinsed
1 medium Red or green pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease a 12" x 6-inch baking dish.
3. Combine black beans, corn, bell pepper, zucchini, and ground pepper in a bowl.
4. Spread half of the bean mixture into the baking dish.
5. Spoon half of the salsa over the bean mixture.
6. Sprinkle with half of the crushed tortilla chips and half of the grated cheese.
7. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
8. Cover with foil.
9. Bake until cheese is melted and vegetables are tender, about 20 minutes.
10. Remove from oven.
11. Position rack 2-3 inches from heat source.
12. Pre-heat broiler.
13. Remove foil.
14. Broil until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
15. Serve in approximately 35 minutes.
